candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line above operating profit, but values are blank and the label is generic rather than clearly tied to Charter Hire, Fuel and Crew Expenses / COGS.
Separate operating depreciation line at the same level as other operating expenses, suggesting it is outside the selected COGS row, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost-of-sales related.
Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but generic and not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.
Separate amortisation line above operating profit; however it appears tied to multi-client assets/revenue model rather than clearly to the selected COGS row.
Separate operating depreciation line, but not specifically identified as part of COGS or the selected direct-cost bucket.

variables.notes: No D&A row is explicitly labelled as COGS / cost of sales / charter hire related. The visible D&A rows are generic operating lines and allocating them to COGS would be speculative, so conservative output is empty to avoid misclassification and double counting.

variables.notes: Although separate D&A rows exist above operating profit, none is explicitly tied to SG&A / admin / selling / R&D. Using any of these as XSGA_DA would require unsupported allocation across operating buckets. Conservative result is empty.
